notes: Macedonian officer and general under Alexander the Great, known for his rash and headstrong character.

docs.title: Life of Eumenes
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … or looking upon Leonnatus as a rash, headstrong, and unsafe man, stole away from him by night, taking with him all his men, namely, three hundred horse, and two hundred of his own servants armed, and all his gold, to the value of five thousand talents of silver, and fled to
